text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahhh. The weather is so nice and warm today...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: So... toasty...

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: ...san Black! Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: So this is where you were! Please get ready!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Uh, for what?

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text:
What do mean "for what"?! Pull yourself together!
We're right in the middle of a music festival!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: We are?!

text_block_list.name: Staff A
text_block_list.text: Look, it's your turn to go on stage! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(I-I rushed out on the stage, but n-n-now what
should I do?!)

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the up-and-coming singing sensation,
Kitasan Black!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Wh-what an incredible audience! I can
practically feel the heat of their cheering!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(And look at all those smiles.. They're all looking
at me with shining eyes!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't let them down... There's only one thing I
can do here...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Here I go, everyone! I hope you'll enjoy...
"Umapyoi Legend"!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Was that... a dream? Phew! That had me going for
a second!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did you have a nice dream, Kita? You're
smiling.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It was the nicest dream ever! Everyone
looking at me had such big smiles!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
It's kinda hard to explain, but I feel like it helped
me grow somehow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From that day on, Kitasan Black's running seems
to be more refined.
